pr_title: fix: B1 step-gate partial_recovery, add medical review example
pr_description: B1 fix**: Scope `partial_recovery` events to `identify_potential_levers` only — stops spurious events for `identify_documents` (which always returns `calls_succeeded=1`). Remove stale `expected_calls=3` constant from `_run_levers`. Medical example**: Replace urban-planning example (Section 106 heritage review) with medical domain (IRB/clinical-site sequential overhead). Three examples now span agriculture, medical, insurance — no domain overlap with test plans. No explicit prohibition added (iter 36 showed prohibitions backfire for small models). Cherry-picked from PR #354 (verdict: NO). Excludes game-dev example and explicit prohibition that caused regressions.
